name: Dino Precision Platformer
short_description: Dino Precision Platformer is an intuitive platformer game in which you play as a cute little dinosaur. The main feature of the game is that the platforms on which the dinosaur must jump appear and disappear at certain points in time.
detailed_description:
Dino Precision Platformer is an intuitive platformer game in which you play as a cute little dinosaur. The main feature of the game is that the platforms on which the dinosaur must jump appear and disappear at certain points in time. There is a timer on each platform that shows when the platform will disappear. Have time to jump over before the ground goes out from under your feet!
The game features cute pixel graphics, which gives the game a special atmosphere and attracts the attention of players.
This platformer is perfect to relax after a hard day. Intuitive controls will allow you to immediately immerse yourself in the game, without lengthy management procedures.
